content_type: informational PSA (voiceover B-roll and text cards)
summary: Video. A TSA human-trafficking awareness PSA combining B-roll of officers at an airport security checkpoint with informational text-card slides ('Signs of a Potential Victim', 'Signs of a Potential Human Trafficker') over a narrated voiceover. It is an educational explainer driven by narration, not a music track.
notable_text: Slides 'Signs of a Potential Victim: Physical/Emotional Abuse, Bruising, Coached'; 'Signs of a Potential Human Trafficker: Limiting the Actions of an Individual, Coaching, Controlling a Person's Identity and Documents'; 'National Human Trafficking Hotline 1-866-373-7888'
